nasb.text: The three older sons of Jesse had gone after Saul to the battle. And the names of his three sons who went to the battle were Eliab the firstborn, and the second to him Abinadab, and the third Shammah.

esv.text: The three oldest sons of Jesse had followed Saul to the battle. And the names of his three sons who went to the battle were Eliab the firstborn, and next to him Abinadab, and the third Shammah.

cnv.text: 耶西的三個大兒子跟隨了掃羅去作戰。去了作戰的這三個兒子的名字是：長子以利押、次子亞比拿達、三子沙瑪。

ccb.text: 他的三个儿子已经跟随扫罗去打仗了，他们是长子以利押、次子亚比拿达和三子沙玛。
